ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vulnerability_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability incident */,
  "cwe_id" TEXT /* Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) identifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vulnerability */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was reported */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the vulnerability */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of vulnerability (e.g., network, application, data) */,
  "affected_system" TEXT /* System or component affected by the vulnerability */,
  "discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who discovered the vulnerability */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the vulnerability was discovered */,
  "mitigation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mitigation efforts (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "antecedents" TEXT /* Set of antecedent CWE identifiers */,
  "consequents" TEXT /* Set of consequent CWE identifiers */,
  "support" REAL /* Support measure for the rule */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence measure for the rule */,
  "lift" REAL /* Lift measure for the rule */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage measure for the rule */,
  "conviction" REAL /* Conviction measure for the rule */,
  "antecedent_len" INTEGER /* Number of antecedents in the rule */,
  "consequent_len" INTEGER /* Number of consequents in the rule */,
  "combo_len" INTEGER /* Total number of CWE identifiers in the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of association rule (e.g., strong, weak, unknown) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Short description of the association rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_rules_consequents FOREIGN KEY ("consequents") REFERENCES cwe_details ("cwe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_rules_antecedents FOREIGN KEY ("antecedents") REFERENCES cwe_details ("cwe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cwe_details" (
  "cwe_id" TEXT /* Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) identifier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vulnerability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vulnerability */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the vulnerability (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "likelihood" TEXT /* Likelihood of the vulnerability being exploited (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the vulnerability (e.g., data breach, system compromise) */,
  "mitigation" TEXT /* Recommended mitigation strategies for the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cwe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the security analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the security analyst (e.g., researcher, analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the security analyst (e.g., security, IT, development) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the security analyst (e.g., incident response, threat intelligence) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the security analyst (e.g., malware analysis, penetration testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security analyst who generated the report */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the association rule that the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for mitigation and remediation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES association_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES security_analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the association rule being evaluated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security analyst who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the association rule (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "usefulness" REAL /* Usefulness of the association rule (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the security analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_evaluations_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES security_analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_evaluations_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES association_rules ("rule_id")
)
